mapper.select:
SELECT page.menu_no AS page_no, page.menu_name AS page_name, COALESCE(page.visible_order, 0) AS page_order_no, page.site_name, page_group.menu_no AS page_grp_no, page_group.menu_name AS page_grp_name, COALESCE(page_group.visible_order, 0) AS page_grp_order_no, menu.menu_no AS menu_no, menu.usr_menu_name AS menu_name, menu.guid AS guid, menu.menu_auth AS menu_auth, COALESCE(menu.visible_order, 0) AS page_menu_order_no, page.web_icon_class, menu.grp_type, menu.scond_use, menu.rt_use, CASE WHEN menu.menu_type IS NOT NULL THEN menu.menu_type ELSE menu.usr_menu_type END AS menu_type, menu.link_view_type FROM com.menu page JOIN com.menu page_group ON page.menu_no = page_group.menu_page_no AND page.site_name = page_group.site_name JOIN ( SELECT a1.*, COALESCE(b1.menu_nm, a1.menu_name) AS usr_menu_name, c1.grp_type, c1.scond_use, c1.rt_use, CASE WHEN NULLIF(c1.guid, '') IS NULL THEN a1.menu_type ELSE 'LAYOUT' END AS usr_menu_type FROM com.menu a1 LEFT OUTER JOIN conf.layout_view_env b1 ON a1.guid = b1.view_kind AND b1.user_id = #{userId} LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT guid, menu_name, grp_type, scond_use, rt_use FROM conf.menu_layout UNION ALL SELECT guid, menu_name, 'NONE' AS grp_type, scond_use, 0 AS rt_use FROM conf.menu_widget ) c1 ON a1.guid = c1.guid ) menu ON page.menu_no = menu.menu_page_no AND page_group.menu_no = menu.menu_page_grp_no AND page.site_name = menu.site_name WHERE page.menu_kind = 'PAGE' AND page_group.menu_kind = 'PAGE_GROUP' AND menu.menu_kind = 'MENU' AND page.site_name = #{siteName} AND menu.is_webuse = 1
AND menu.menu_no IN ( SELECT rel_key_no FROM rel.auth_menu_rel WHERE auth_id = CASE WHEN #{menuAuthNo} = 0 THEN CASE WHEN #{auth} = 'Admin' THEN 1 WHEN #{auth} = 'MUser' THEN 2 WHEN #{auth} = 'User' THEN 3 ELSE 0 END ELSE #{menuAuthNo} END )
ORDER BY page_order_no, page_grp_order_no, page_menu_order_no

SELECT a.menu_kind AS menu_type, a.menu_no, CASE WHEN a.menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no WHEN a.menu_kind = 'PAGE_GROUP' THEN menu_page_no END AS page_grp_no, a.menu_name, a.guid FROM com.menu a WHERE site_name = #{siteName} AND ((is_webuse = 1 AND menu_kind = 'MENU') OR menu_kind != 'MENU')
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM conf.menu_layout b WHERE a.guid = b.guid)
ORDER BY visible_order ASC

SELECT a.menu_no AS "menuNo", COALESCE(b.menu_cnt, 0) AS "menuCnt" FROM ( SELECT menu_no, menu_name FROM com.menu WHERE site_name = #{siteName} AND ((is_webuse = 1 AND menu_kind = 'MENU') OR menu_kind != 'MENU') AND menu_kind = 'PAGE_GROUP' ORDER BY visible_order ASC ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no END AS page_grp_no, COUNT(menu_no) AS menu_cnt FROM com.menu WHERE site_name = #{siteName} AND ((is_webuse = 1 AND menu_kind = 'MENU') OR menu_kind != 'MENU') AND menu_kind = 'MENU' GROUP BY CASE WHEN menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no END ) b ON a.menu_no = b.page_grp_no WHERE b.menu_cnt IS NULL

SELECT c.page_grp_no AS "pageGrpNo", SUM(c.menu_cnt) AS "menuCnt" FROM ( SELECT a.*, COALESCE(b.menu_cnt, 0) AS menu_cnt FROM ( SELECT menu_kind AS menu_type, menu_no, CASE WHEN menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no WHEN menu_kind = 'PAGE_GROUP' THEN menu_page_no END AS page_grp_no, menu_name FROM com.menu WHERE site_name = #{siteName} AND ((is_webuse = 1 AND menu_kind = 'MENU') OR menu_kind != 'MENU') ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no END AS page_grp_no, COUNT(menu_no) AS menu_cnt FROM ( SELECT menu_kind AS menu_type, menu_no, CASE WHEN menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no WHEN menu_kind = 'PAGE_GROUP' THEN menu_page_no END AS page_grp_no, menu_name FROM com.menu WHERE site_name = #{siteName} AND ((is_webuse = 1 AND menu_kind = 'MENU') OR menu_kind != 'MENU') ) sub WHERE sub.menu_type = 'MENU' GROUP BY CASE WHEN menu_kind = 'MENU' THEN menu_page_grp_no END ) b ON a.menu_no = b.page_grp_no WHERE a.menu_type != 'MENU' ) c WHERE c.menu_type = 'PAGE_GROUP' GROUP BY c.page_grp_no HAVING SUM(c.menu_cnt) = 0

SELECT a.menu_name, a.guid, a.grp_type, a.scond_use, CASE WHEN b.guid IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_reg_menu FROM conf.menu_layout a LEFT JOIN com.menu b ON a.guid = b.guid AND b.menu_kind = 'MENU' AND b.site_name = #{siteName}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM com.menu a JOIN rel.auth_menu_rel b ON a.menu_no = b.rel_key_no JOIN com."user" c ON b.auth_id = COALESCE( c.menu_auth_no, CASE WHEN c.auth = 'Admin' THEN 1 WHEN c.auth = 'MUser' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END ) WHERE a.menu_kind = 'MENU' AND c.user_id = #{userId} AND a.guid = #{guid}
SELECT menu_no::text FROM com.menu WHERE guid = 'BB590E9A-A453-4F8A-B1D8-737A4D07BDD0' LIMIT 1

WITH parent_menu AS ( SELECT * FROM com.menu WHERE menu_kind IN ('PAGE', 'PAGE_GROUP') ) SELECT (SELECT menu_name FROM parent_menu pm WHERE pm.menu_no = m.menu_page_no) AS "menuPageName", (SELECT menu_name FROM parent_menu pm WHERE pm.menu_no = m.menu_page_grp_no) AS "menuGrpName", m.menu_name AS "menuName" FROM com.menu m WHERE guid = #{guid}
